description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Sonar Source Analysis that runs on push to the master branch and on pull request events. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job to download and set up JDK 11, cache SonarCloud packages, download and configure sonar-scanner and build-wrapper, install dependencies, start Xvfb, install pyenv, run build-wrapper, analyze coverage, and finally run sonar-scanner to analyze the code on SonarCloud.
